name: Gentleman's Assassin
philosophy: Quiet development through the Pianissimo Cage, then precise kingside strike via Nf1→Ng3→Nf5.

coiledSpring.label: The 9-Move Coiled Spring
coiledSpring.description: The ideal main line. Play this when Black cooperates.

moves.note: Control center, open lines for bishop.
Pianissimo — no rush, build the cage.
Queenside space, prevents b5 bishop kick.
King safety before the attack begins.
Prevent Bg4 pin, prep Ng3 route.
Rook to open file, supports e4 and e5 push.

assassinChecklist.label: Assassin Activation Checklist
assassinChecklist.description: All 7 must be true before launching the kingside attack.

items.note: Central support and future Re3 swing.
Path open for the knight maneuver.

strikeSequence.label: Strike Sequence
strikeSequence.description: Execute after all 7 checklist items are confirmed.

repertoireLines.name: Giuoco Pianissimo
repertoireLines.note: Main line. Black mirrors development. Stay patient, execute the cage.

repertoireLines.name: Two Knights d3
repertoireLines.note: Black plays Nf6 instead of Bc5. Avoid complications, keep d3 solid.

repertoireLines.name: Sicilian Bc4 Bypass
repertoireLines.note: Black plays Sicilian. Bypass theory with Bc4, steer into familiar territory.

repertoireLines.name: Petrov d3 Refusal
repertoireLines.note: Black plays Petrov. Refuse symmetry with d3, maintain initiative.

tactics.name: The Strangler
tactics.description: Slowly restrict Black's pieces until they have no good moves. Use pawn advances to choke space.

tactics.name: Queenside Expansion
tactics.description: Use a4-a5 to gain queenside space and fix Black's pawns as targets.

tactics.name: Toxic Baiting
tactics.description: Offer material that is poisoned — capture leads to a decisive positional or tactical loss.

tactics.name: High-Velocity Sacrifice
tactics.description: Once Nf5 is established, sacrifice material to rip open the kingside and deliver checkmate.

tactics.name: Central Explosion
tactics.description: The d4 break at the right moment destroys Black's center and opens lines for all pieces.

deviations.response: Don't panic. Maintain c3/d3 structure. Exchange on d5 only if it opens your pieces favorably.

deviations.trigger: Black attacks your Bc4 with b5
deviations.response: Retreat to Bb3. The bishop is still active and aims at f7 from b3.
Delay Ng3. Prioritize Re1 and solidify before counter-attacking.
Recapture with d-pawn if possible to maintain center. Keep the cage intact.
Shift to central pressure. Use d4 break earlier to open files against the uncastled king.

quizWrongAnswer.message: Nyet. The cage must be built in order. Patience before power. Try again.

checklistIncomplete.trigger: Player attempts strike before checklist complete
checklistIncomplete.message: You are not ready. The assassin does not strike until the conditions are perfect. Check your list.

tacticsDeepDive.trigger: Player clicks a tactic for explanation
tacticsDeepDive.message: Let me show you exactly how this weapon works at a technical level.

blackResponseCoaching.trigger: Player selects a Black response line
blackResponseCoaching.message: Here is how Black is trying to punish you — and here is the precise refutation.
